title: Jacques Revel
body: Jacques Revel (French pronunciation: [ʒak ʁəvɛl]; 25 July 1942 – 12 March 2026) was a French historian. He was the emeritus director of studies and a president of l'École des hautes études en sciences sociales (EHESS). Revel died on 12 March 2026, at the age of 83.
categories: Academic staff of the School for Advanced Studies in the Social Sciences
